requirement.title: Add external repo provisioning support to CTO backbone
requirement.description: Extend the pipeline so it can provision a target repo (new or existing), run all agents inside it, and open a PR. 8 file categories changed across agent prompts, command definition, and web dashboard.

architect.summary: 10-file plan with milestones, ADRs, dependency order (shared.jsx before dashboard/run-detail). Identified gap: touch /tmp/start_marker missing from developer.md.

security.summary: BLOCKED with 10 remediations (R1-R10). All incorporated into Developer brief before Group 2. No fundamental redesign needed.

developer.summary: 11 files written with all 10 security remediations incorporated.

qa.summary: All 4 first-round findings fixed. Re-verification passed 100% confidence.
